title: 2pcs Stainless Steel Towel Holder Hooks Brass Chrome Door Bathroom Robe 2 Hook Hat Clothes Wall Door Hanger
features: This wall mounted double robe hook would suit both contemporary & modern bathrooms, no rust and can be used for a long time.

Constructed of high quality 304 stainless steel, covered with top quality material to create a bright, highly reflective, cool metallic look. Triple plated to resist rust and corrosion through everyday use.
Wide application: Apply for coat, towel, handbag, headphone and any others in bathroom, bedroom, living room, office door and other places, providing a elegant look throughout the home
Size:4.7x4.7x7.5cm(2pcs per pack ). Easy to install, all Fixtures and Fittings Included you can install with just screw driver in door or wall
Hand polished stainless steel finished, modern look and no worry about daily scratches, can be used for a long time.
description: Product Description Easy To Install Screw off the back cover of the bathroom hook Measure the pitch and drill the holes Use the hammer to put the expansion screws into holes and align the bottom part with the screw hole and tighten the screws Tighten the inner hexagon screw with the hexagon wrench Specifiction Material: Brass Size: 4.7x4.7x7.5cm Package includes: 2x Towel Hook Mounting accessories Hand polished stainless steel finished, modern look and no worry about daily scratches, easy to clean.ensuring durability and dependability, while maintain aesthetic appeal Covered with top quality material to create a bright, highly reflective, cool metallic look. Triple plated to resist rust and corrosion through everyday use.
